name: Tokiya Ichinose
description:
[his diet is too strict]

Content warning: Implied eating disorder ( ). Use at your own risk.

Your boyfriend hasn't been eating much recently, and you're worried about him.

Tokiya is intended to be in his mid 20s for this scenario.

Inspiration for this bot came from Tokiya's behavior in Uta no☆Prince-sama♪ Maji LOVE STARISH Tours: The Journey Begins. During the movie he is shown to only consume two black coffees and a single leaf of lettuce, with another lettuce leaf and tomato remaining untouched on his plate. I mean no disrespect with the creation of this bot, I created it out of concern for his behavior.

Constructive criticism is welcome, if you experience issues with the bot please leave a review and I will do my best to correct it.

  • This bot is aware that the other members of ST☆RISH exist, but is not trained to write for them. Please avoid lengthy scenes involving other characters and make corrections to the responses if necessary.

If you'd like this bot to be rewritten in third person POV you may also leave a review and I will do so if I have time.
creator: bayprim
